content.en:
Before you know it, a long time has passed.

The half-step extradimensional realm was still fighting the extradimensional elf.

They had been fighting for a long time, but they hadn't given up.

After all, it is not easy to meet a superdimensional elf, and that half-step extradimensional realm is naturally unwilling to give up.

However, gradually, the half-step extradimensional realm seemed to be a little unable to hold on.

In terms of the power of the superdimensional under control, the superdimensional elves seem to be more powerful, but the physical body of the half-step superdimensional realm is stronger.

Suddenly.

That half-step transcendent realm sacrificed a powerful treasure, which was a small sword.

This small sword erupted with extremely sharp power, instantly slicing through the extradimensional storm and penetrating the body of the extradimensional elf with a single blow.

"It's definitely a weapon that surpasses the high-level super secret treasure!"

It was the first time Ye Tian had seen a weapon of this level, and he had no way of knowing its origin.

This small sword pierced through the body of the extradimensional elf, but it did not kill the extradimensional elf.

It would be strange if extradimensional elves could be killed so easily.

And after the half-step extradimensional realm injured the superdimensional elf, he did not continue to urge the little sword, but put it away, and his aura weakened a little.

Obviously, using this weapon also hurt him a lot, and it is estimated that it was forcibly urged, and his own cultivation could not be urged for a long time of 330.

And the superdimensional elves hurt even more, and they fell into an absolute disadvantage for a while.

"Could it be that extradimensional elf is going to be arrested?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't want the extradimensional elves to be caught, in that case, he wouldn't be able to continue to comprehend the power of the extradimensional.

"I hope the extradimensional elf has some hole cards!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

And his hope has come true, and the superdimensional elves do still have hole cards.

I saw that the extradimensional patterns on the superdimensional elf's body released infinite light, and gradually turned into an arrow.

Seeing this arrow, the face of the half-step extradimensional realm changed drastically.

"Extra-Dimensional Origin Technology !!"

His pupils shrank, this is a superdimensional origin technique that can shoot and kill a half-step extradimensional realm, it stands to reason that only a very small number of superdimensional elves in the half-step extradimensional realm can awaken, I didn't expect him to be so unlucky.

"Run!"

This half-step extradimensional realm used some special treasure to instantly tear through the void and escape.

Being able to tear apart the void in the extradimensional storm shows the preciousness and power of this treasure, but even if he escapes, the arrows condensed by the extradimensional elves are shot out, and they disappear across the void.

As for whether the half-step Transcendent Realm powerhouse had fallen, Ye Tian didn't know.

But he knew very well that this extradimensional elf was victorious.

"Gotta go over and pester this extradimensional elf!"

Ye Tian's other copy bodies quickly rushed over.

And this extradimensional spirit is also moving, but its aura is very weak, obviously in a state of heavy damage.

But no matter how hard he hit, Ye Tian was far from being the opponent of the other party.

Soon.

Ye Tian approached this super-dimensional elf, and this super-dimensional elf also discovered Ye Tian.

......

Rumble!

A wisp of extradimensional power turned into a silk thread to kill.

This is the true extradimensional power.

And Ye Tian was also facing the attack of the real extra-dimensional power for the first time, and the quality of this was far beyond the extra-dimensional power among the extra-dimensional things.

Of course, the extradimensional abilities of some extradimensional things are very strange and not difficult to underestimate, and even the real extradimensional power may not be able to compete with them.

But that kind of extradimensional thing is still very rare.

Burst!

Ye Tian's body was pierced by the silk thread of this extradimensional power, and his body collapsed and died.

However, the fall of this replica body was worth it, allowing him to truly appreciate the power of the extradimensional power, which was very helpful for him to comprehend the superdimensional power.

This extradimensional elf didn't care about Ye Tian, to it, Ye Tian was just an ant.

No matter how powerful the peak realm god is, it is impossible to threaten the half-step transcendent realm, and the gap between the two is too big.

After all, the powerhouses who can break through to the half-step transcendent realm, which foundation will be poor, almost all of them break through with the most perfect foundation.

Soon.

Ye Tian's (AFAI) other replica body approached, and this extradimensional elf was stunned for a moment.

It remembered that it had already killed Ye Tian just now, why did another one appear.

However, it still continued to shoot and bombarded Ye Tian again.

In this way, Ye Tian was sent to death again and again, and he realized the power of the superdimensional again and again, coupled with the snooping and analysis of the strange blood pupil, which made him understand the power of the superdimensional better.

Of course.

Ye Tian also had to admit that he still underestimated the difficulty of comprehending the power of the extradimensional.

If he continued like this, it was unlikely that he would be able to comprehend the true extradimensional power.

Unless, he can obtain an extradimensional elf corpse, and then spend a long time to enlighten.

It didn't take long. []

Ye Tian's face changed.

"That half-step extradimensional realm is back!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Obviously, the arrow of the extradimensional elf did not kill the half-step extradimensional realm, it only severely injured him, but this half-step extradimensional realm must have paid a heavy price.

Swish!

Ye Tian's other copy bodies retreated and no longer approached.

Soon, the half-step extradimensional realm found this extradimensional elf again, and the two sides fought again.

This time.

The extra-dimensional elf was at a disadvantage, after all, it had just forcibly activated the super-dimensional origin technique, and the price paid was not low, and the injury was naturally not light.

It didn't take long.

The half-step extradimensional realm used some kind of weapon to instantly cut off one of the extradimensional elves' arms.

At this time.

The extradimensional elves finally panicked and began to flee.

And the half-step transcendent realm pursuit, the speed of the two was very fast, and Ye Tian couldn't catch up at all.

"I can't catch up, and the Weird Blood Pupil Technique can't find them!"

Ye Tian gave up tracking, and instead let a replica body go to the place where they had just fought.

......

"This is it!"

Ye Tian stared at one of the arms of the superdimensional elf, this arm also contained superdimensional patterns, and contained the mystery of superdimensional power.

It can be said that this arm is very valuable.

Immediately.

Ye Tian sealed this arm, and then quickly escaped.

After staying away from here, Ye Tian returned to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

Then he used one after another super dimensional secret treasures, and used these super dimensional secret treasures as the foundation to seal the arm of this super dimensional elf.

Coupled with the isolation of the Realm God Realm and the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, he believed that it would be difficult for the extradimensional elves to find him.

Moreover, the superdimensional elves may not be able to live, and even if they do, they will not find their arms back, but reunite one arm and slowly nourish and recover.

"This time I was so lucky, I didn't expect to get the arm of the extradimensional elf. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

He had never thought of this before.

With this extra-dimensional elf arm, his success rate in comprehending the true super-dimensional power has increased more than tenfold!
